results.title: Sakkani Bomma
results.overview: After a series of heartbreaks, a man finally finds solace in a mannequin, and he doesn't know what's in store for them.

results.title: Psych Siddhartha
results.overview: Siddharth's life is a string of misfortunes, losing love, money, and dignity, making him the unwitting star of a slum-based comedy of errors. Hope only reappears in the form of Shravya, a no-nonsense single mother. However, just as Siddharth begins to rebuild his life and pursue a chance at love, his past resurfaces to threaten everything.

results.title: Vanaveera
results.overview: A descendant of the Vanara clan is pushed into conflict when a modern-day Ravana seizes his only bike for an election rally. What starts as a petty injustice soon erupts into a fierce fight for self-respect and dignity

results.title: Nilakanta
results.overview: Saraswathipuram is a Village,where Education is Well Valued.nilakanta Work as a Tailor in That Village.nilakanta is Wise and Good From Childhood, He Believes in Karma but Unfortunately Karma Curses Him, No Matter How Big an Opponent He is,he Fights Bravely for His Life.who is That Rival ?

results.title: The Rajasaab
results.overview: Seeking his lost grandfather, a young man enters a haunted mansion and awakens a family curse powerful enough to upend both his life and reality.

results.title: Mana ShankaraVaraPrasad Garu
results.overview: National security officer Vara Prasad, protecting his estranged wife and kids from a vengeful ex-cop, sees it as a chance to rebuild their relationship after six years apart.

results.title: Bhartha Mahasayulaku Wignyapthi
results.overview: What begins as a casual fling between a married man, Ram a.k.a Satya and Manasa in the middle of an international business trip, balloons into an out-of-the-blue mess when the latter lands in Hyderabad, disrupting Ram’s otherwise stable marriage with Balamani.

results.title: Gamer
results.overview: Two strangers uncover a hidden child trafficking and exploitation network operating in plain sight. As they risk everything to protect innocent lives, an unexpected bond grows between them. A gripping story of courage, compassion, and love born in the fight for justice.

results.title: Naari Naari Naduma Murari
results.overview: A young man's life turns upside down when he finds himself caught between two women, leading to an unexpected love triangle filled with emotions, misunderstandings, and tough decisions. As relationships intertwine, he must confront his feelings, face reality, and choose what truly matters, blending romance with heartfelt family drama.

results.title: Anaganaga Oka Raju
results.overview: A lazy, entitled brat who wants to lead an easy life is in for a rude shock that changes the course of his life.

results.title: Sandhya Nama Upasate
results.overview: The war never ends—it only changes its battlefield, from power and pride to wealth, and now to health and humanity. COVID pushed the world into unseen trenches, where survival itself became a daily conflict and solitude a shared emotion.

results.title: Mission C1000
results.overview: Hindu Atankwad and the Honey Trap is a film about a character named Ram who tries to stop terrorists from stealing a scientific formula. The movie explores themes of patriotism, cultural identity, and the fight against terrorism

results.title: Cheekatilo
results.overview: When crime anchor Sandhya’s best friend is found dead under suspicious circumstances, she embarks on a dangerous investigation that collides with a dark past. As secrets unravel, Sandhya must face her trauma and rise as a fearless voice for the silenced.

results.title: O’Sey Balamma
results.overview: During the Sankranti festival celebrations, a matriarch and her housekeeper confront solitude through the intimacy of each other’s company.

results.title: Jaambie
results.overview: Two dumb, pretentious, good-for-nothing gangsters, Anna and Dhed Dimag along with Shiva are waiting for Mallesh's death news. All hell breaks loose when they get a visit from a Zombie, sorry Jaambie who happens to look like Mallesh... or... is the Jaambie, Mallesh himself?

results.title: The Cinephile - Monarchy of Madness
results.overview: Facing his final days and driven by one last wish, a cinephile clings to cinema, where passion turns dangerous and madness slowly finds its throne.

results.title: Virgo
results.overview: It captures both the conflict (toxic plant vs addiction) and the central emotional force (maternal love).

results.title: Devagudi
results.overview: Three childhood friends whose bond is fractured by caste divisions and challenging circumstances. A pivotal incident disrupts their lives and relationships.

results.title: Om Shanti Shanti Shantihi
results.overview: Prashanthi gives up her dreams for love, only to fall into abusive relationships first with her lecturer and later with her husband, Omkar, who pretends to support her but turns violent and manipulative. After enduring trauma, betrayal, and a heartbreaking miscarriage, she secretly strengthens herself, escapes his control, and rebuilds her life by starting a successful business. When Omkar's abuse becomes public and reaches court, she refuses divorce, not out of love, but to ensure no other woman suffers the same fate

results.title: The Conversation
results.overview: What starts off as a routine therapy session for Michael slowly turns out to be not what it seems.
